name: Mushrooms Evangeline
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant and lightly golden.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are browned and tender, about 10-12 minutes.
4. Stir in the marjoram, chicken broth, and white wine. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until it has thickened slightly.
6. Season with black pepper to taste. Serve hot.
